risks.risk: No prompt regression testing — prompt quality unverified
No context window management — CLAUDE.md growth risk
No SLO definitions — no measurable reliability targets
No threat model — security vulnerabilities undetected pre-code
No technical debt register — debt invisible and unmanaged

gap_domains.notes: No prompt regression testing (AI-003), HITL triggers (AI-026/032), context window mgmt (AI-008-013), action scope enforcement (AI-033)
No SLO definitions, no structured logging, no distributed tracing, no alerting policy
No threat model, no SAST/DAST, --dangerouslySkipPermissions risk, no security review gates
No load testing, no perf baselines, no profiling in CI, no perf regression gates
No technical debt register (ME-003), dependency upgrade cadence, deprecation policy, long-term evolution roadmap
Release notes automation, canary/blue-green strategy, feature flags, changelog generation gaps
Environment parity, secrets management, infrastructure-as-code coverage, networking gaps
Integration test coverage, contract testing, mutation testing, test data management
Deployment pipeline coverage, rollback procedures, artifact provenance, environment promotion gates
Input validation at boundaries, API versioning, rate limiting, error response standardization
Schema migration strategy, data retention policy, backup/restore validation, query optimization
ADR documentation, service boundary definitions, scalability design gaps
Requirements traceability, user story coverage, acceptance criteria gaps
API reference docs, runbook coverage, onboarding guide, architecture diagrams
Dev container, editor config parity, CLI UX, local test runner ergonomics
Sprint planning, WIP limits, retrospective cadence, dependency tracking
Accessibility, component testing, error boundary coverage, responsive design
